name: radiology-copilot
description: Electron desktop shell for the Radiology Copilot

scripts.start:demo: npm run build && RADCOPILOT_DEMO=1 node dist/scripts/run-dev-electron.js
scripts.start:vite: npm run build && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 node dist/scripts/run-dev-electron.js
scripts.start:vite:demo: npm run build && RADCOPILOT_DEMO=1 VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 node dist/scripts/run-dev-electron.js
scripts.reset:permissions: tccutil reset Microphone com.radiologycopilot.revu.dev; tccutil reset ScreenCapture com.radiologycopilot.revu.dev; tccutil reset Microphone com.radiologycopilot.revu.dev.helper; tccutil reset Microphone com.radiologycopilot.revu.dev.helper.renderer; tccutil reset Microphone com.radiologycopilot.revu.dev.helper.gpu; tccutil reset Microphone com.radiologycopilot.revu.dev.helper.plugin; tccutil reset Microphone com.github.Electron; tccutil reset ScreenCapture com.github.Electron; exit 0
